entries.description: Here's what the biggest tech court case of the year is all about.

entries.description: The update gives users enhanced flexibility over how they can manage their workflows.

entries.description: Privacy will be a major theme when Apple unveils a new version of Siri.

entries.description: A big theme in the trial’s final days was whether OpenAI CEO Sam Altman is trustworthy.

entries.title: If you’re giving a commencement speech in 2026, maybe don’t mention AI
entries.description: It's tough to get graduating students excited about a future shaped by artificial intelligence.

entries.title: TechCrunch Mobility: The AI skills arms race is coming for automotive
entries.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

entries.title: The haves and have-nots of the AI gold rush
entries.description: The vibes around the current AI boom aren't great, even in the tech industry.

entries.title: Research repository ArXiv will ban authors for a year if they let AI do all the work
entries.description: ArXiv is doing more to crack down on the careless use of large language models in scientific papers.

entries.title: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy
entries.description: OpenAI's latest shake-up comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.

entries.title: SandboxAQ brings its drug discovery models to Claude — no PhD in computing required
entries.description: Other venture-backed companies like Chai Discovery and Isomorphic Labs have raced to build better models. SandboxAQ is betting that access is the bigger obstacle and that Claude solves it.

entries.title: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
entries.description: Elon Musk's claim that he was mistreated by his OpenAI co-founders failed after nine California jurors decided in a unanimous verdict that his lawsuits had been filed too late.

entries.title: Amazon’s new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes
entries.description: Amazon’s Alexa+ can now generate custom AI podcasts on demand, as the company expands its assistant into a personalized AI content platform.

entries.title: South Korea’s LetinAR is building optics behind AI glasses
entries.description: A lens the size of a thumbnail — and the South Korean startup that makes it — could become the optical backbone of the AI glasses era.

entries.title: The OpenAI trial wraps up, and the Musk founder machine keeps spinning

entries.title: Silicon Valley’s vacationland needs a new energy provider just as AI is driving prices up
entries.description: Lake Tahoe, Silicon Valley's favorite vacation spot, is about to get hit with higher energy prices as AI drives demand for electricity.

entries.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT for personal finance, will let you connect bank accounts
entries.description: Once users connect their accounts, they will see a dashboard of their portfolio performance, spending, subscriptions, and upcoming payments.

entries.title: Runway started by helping filmmakers — now it wants to beat Google at AI
entries.description: AI video-generation startup Runway is betting that video generation is the path to world models. And that being an AI outsider is an advantage, not a liability.

entries.title: Osaurus brings both local and cloud AI models to your Mac
entries.description: Osaurus￼ combines local and cloud AI models in a Mac app that keeps users’ memory, files, and tools on their own hardware.
